title: Mythralite
description: This Mod adds 2  new Swords to Minecraft: The Void Sword and the Zeus Sword.
body:
## Mythralite adds two new Swords to Minecraft:
1. The Void Sword
2. The Zeus Sword

###    Material (both swords use the same):
- Durability: 3256
- Mining Speed: 12.0
- Enchantability: 20
- Repair Tag: 
```
netherite_tool_materials
```
### Void Sword:
- Attack damage bonus: +5.0
- Attack speed bonus: -2.0 (2 attacks per second)
- Total Damage: ~9
- Ability cooldown: 100 ticks (5s)
- Ability: when right clicked: teleports the player 8 blocks in the targeted direction (costs 1 durability)
- Recipe: 
- ![Recipe of the Void Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1243333a090434518305a4170a9375caa7fffc53_0.webp)
###   Zeus Sword:
- Attack damage bonus: +7.0
- Attack speed bonus: -2.4 (1.66 attacks per second)
- Total damage: ~11
- Ability Cooldown: 320 ticks (16s)
- Ability: summons lightning bolt on target, sets attacker as cause (costs 0 durability, default item behavior)
- Recipe: 
- ![Recipe of the Zeus Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39e14d44f2d2a854f629ad9fc71767d5594f6eb9_0.webp)

### Check out my other project:
[Housing Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/housing-plus)
